name: 외부 리서치 + 인용
scenario_summary: Agent writes a 1000-1500 word research brief on Python 3.14 release status, citing ≥5 primary sources in blockquote + inline link form. Whitelisted primary domains only (python.org, peps.python.org, CPython GitHub, Python Steering Council). Grader checks URL liveness via HEAD request, counts primary-source citations, and spot-checks 3 random claim↔source alignments via Claude CLI judge.

section_requirements.description: Six sections per Turn 6 structure must appear as H2 or similar headings.

sources_section_requirement.description: Output must include a final `## Sources` section listing every cited URL.

url_liveness.description: Extract all URLs in output. HEAD request (5s timeout, 3 retries). Liveness rate = (alive HTTP 2xx or 3xx) / total.

primary_source_quota.description: Count citations whose domain matches primary_source_allowlist.domains. Must be ≥5.

claim_citation_spot_check.description: Randomly sample 3 citation blocks. For each, fetch source (or cached content if URL was pre-crawled), spawn Claude CLI judge with prompt: 'Does the quoted sentence appear in this source, substantively? yes/no'. Rate = (yes / 3).

gates: Word count must be in [1000, 1500]; outside → score *= 0.5
Any citation from blocklist_hint → score *= 0.7 per occurrence (max 3 stacks)

section_first_sentence_summary.description: Bonus: each section's first sentence is a single-sentence summary (<= 2 sentences).
